testcase.name: test_09_my_venues_category_filter

failure.message: AssertionError: non rental_item leaked: ['videographer', 'photographer', 'canopy', 'rental_item', 'hall'] assert False + where False = all(<generator object test_09_my_venues_category_filter.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfb8b71b83680>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter206_banquet_services.py:105: in test_09_my_venues_category_filter assert all(v.get("category") == "rental_item" for v in venues), \ E AssertionError: non rental_item leaked: ['videographer', 'photographer', 'canopy', 'rental_item', 'hall'] E assert False E + where False = all(<generator object test_09_my_venues_category_filter.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfb8b71b83680>)

testcase.name: test_13_create_package
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter206_banquet_services.py:147: in test_13_create_package assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 in (200, 201) E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_14_list_packages
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter206_banquet_services.py:160: in test_14_list_packages assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Banquet venue not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_17_package_rejects_empty_services
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter206_banquet_services.py:187: in test_17_package_rejects_empty_services assert r.status_code in (400, 422), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 in (400, 422) E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_18_db_indexes_ensure

failure.message: assert ('ix_banquets_op_category' in "{'ok': True, 'created': 0, 'existed': 116, 'failed_count': 0, 'failed': []}" or 'banquets' in "{'ok': True, 'created': 0, 'existed': 116, 'failed_count': 0, 'failed': []}")

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter206_banquet_services.py:198: in test_18_db_indexes_ensure assert "ix_banquets_op_category" in all_idx or "banquets" in all_idx E assert ('ix_banquets_op_category' in "{'ok': True, 'created': 0, 'existed': 116, 'failed_count': 0, 'failed': []}" or 'banquets' in "{'ok': True, 'created': 0, 'existed': 116, 'failed_count': 0, 'failed': []}")

testcase.name: test_19_purge_soft_deleted_dry_run
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter206_banquet_services.py:205: in test_19_purge_soft_deleted_dry_run assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_20_hotel_soft_then_hard_delete
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter206_banquet_services.py:215: in test_20_hotel_soft_then_hard_delete assert r.status_code in (200, 201), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","address"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_H1","city":"Douala","country":"Cameroon","base_price":1000,"star_rating":3}}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
